title: Ever Since Venus
writer: McElbert Moore, Arthur Dreifuss, Connie Lee
actors: Ina Ray Hutton, Hugh Herbert, Ann Savage
plot: The American Beauty Association is about to hold its annual trade show in New York City and songwriter "Tiny" Lewis (Billy Gilbert) has just sold a song to Ina Ray Hutton (Ina Ray Hutton), the leader of an all-girl band headlining...
